comment.body: Thanks. Seems like a) that would be a pretty big deal, b) it may not necessarily be an “event,” and c) for sure it’s a probabilities thing. But the way I read it makes it sound like a realistic possibility. Sometimes I feel crazy thinking the bottom has to fall out eventually (as the ATHs keep rolling in month after month, year after year). But maybe I’m not crazy after all.

comment.body:
Nah you are not crazy. I am amazed at how well Alma called the April event and recovery. She is probably the only trading expert that I know of on Twitter that also blended geopolitics and the russia/usa/saudi alignment angle. A maestro combines inputs from various fields. She also called this well in the weekly post regarding how Trump is manipulating the market. Bessent for example is doing stealth QE, dollar has fallen to the lowest level in 4 years. Yen carry trade is changing and bonds are blowing out. Signs of a country debasing its currency to blow the bubble further. 

Not many folks can trade well just based on macro alone given that historical correlations break down. High bond yields should have killed this rally however it keeps going due to other manipulations. Thanks to her rigorous math background she is able to call it well. 

However even normal folks who are observant can see stuff is breaking under the hood. That big correction in 2026 depends on a lot on if the powers to be can continue this game of musical chairs or not. 

Once again you are not crazy , this is a rigged game plain and simple and always was. Even in today  morning'
